title: BottleCaps [Cobblemon]
description: Bottle Caps adds recipes for bottle caps that let's you max out your Pokémon's IVs.
body:
---

🔵 BottleCaps ⚪

BottleCpas in the Cobblemon mod. This datapack introduces the concept of Silver and Golden Bottle Caps into Minecraft, inspired by Pokémon! Players can now use Silver Bottle Caps to maximize the IVS of a single stat or Golden Bottle Caps to maximize the IVS of all stats. To use this addon just download the zip and place it in the datapack's folder of your minecraft world and resourcepack folder of your game. Both Datapack and Resourcepack are in a single zip.

📋 Bottle Caps Recipe List 🍾

  • Silver Bottle Cap:
  • Golden Bottle Cap:


    ⚙️ How it works 📖



    Hold a Golden Bottle Cap in your off-hand. When you crouch, your first Pokémon will get all their IVS maxed. You can also use a Silver Bottle Cap by renaming it to any of the 6 stats you want to max out (rename them to the words inside the (parenthesis)): Attack (Atk), Defence (Def), Speed (Speed), HP (HP), Special Attack (Sp.Atk) and Special Defence (Sp.Def). You will have to rename the item to the correct stat or else the Bottle Cap will be consumed without giving out the stat.

    Have some issues? You can join the Official Cobblemon discord server, search for 'BottleCaps' and ask your questions there, or alternatively, you can DM me on discord.
